get.description: Returns list of available search attributes for authenticated user

parameters.name: PASSWORD
parameters.description: Base64 encoded SHA1 hash of flexite user password. Original password in example is 'password'

400.description: Authentication cannot be performed due to incorrect or missing header(s)

404.description: Process or instance could not be found

429.description: Account/IP is blocked due to too many unsuccessful login attempts

message.example: The file is bigger than allowed
Incorrect value or value can't be selected
Instance can't be signed due to component errors

text.example:
I have water leakage in my appartments.
Please, fix it

I have water leakage in my appartments.
Please, fix it

replyAll.description: Reply to the sender and all other receivers

identity.description: Base64 encoded SHA1 hash of identity unique string in case of identity sender. Original identity in example is '210414-2381'

CommonValue.description: A value held by an attribute.

id.description: Id of value, or number value

filename.description: File name, in the case value is of a file type.

IdentityAttributeChange.description: Holds information about a value change for an attribute.

IdentitySaveRequest.description: Holds edited information attributes to be saved to the provided identity after being validated.

IdentitySaveResponse.description: Produced after saving attributes for the provided identity. Will hold any validation error messages in its result if problems occured.

errors.description: Holds any errors that occurred during validation. Empty or OK results indicates a successful save attempt.

ValidationError.description: Contains information about an attribute which did not validate correctly.

message.example: Value is less than the allowed number 4.

expiredNowOrWhenSigned.description: Instance is expired now or when signed

daysSinceInitiated.description: Nunber of days since instance was initiated

originalId.description: Original message ID (in case of reply)

text.example:
I have water leakage in my appartments.
Please, fix it

IdentityAttribute.description: A value held by an identity attribute and its parameters.

description.example: This is the e-mail adress that will receive information and notifications.

required.description: Whether this attribute must have a value.

IdentityAttributesResponse.description: Holds information attributes about the provided identity.

attributes.description: List of available attributes, with configurations and values from the provided identity.

ValidationRule.description: Describes a requirement or rule that must be fulfilled for the attribute to be validated successfully.

IdentityProcessFileLimit.description: Holds file size limits for a process.

messageFileLimit.description: Maximum size of attachments in kilobytes, -1 = attachments disabled, 0 = unlimited.

IdentityService.description: Holds information about an E-service belonging to a process.
